text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I shouldn't forget that you're an adult,
Trainer—no matter how cute you are.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! It's just that you appeared in my dream last
night as a little child.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You were chasing after me, yelling "Mamaaa!" Sigh... It was adorable.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling great today since I got to spoil you a
whole lot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at a loss for words... but glad she seems well
rested.
